name: Valcheck Frank D Inc
districts_or_customers: Hillsborough Township SD and other Somerset County, NJ districts; ~1,500 students/day
recent_news: Long-tenured NJSBCA primary contractor; ~45+ years transporting students per 2008 FTA filing — multi-generational family operator with no recent M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Classic Summit tuck-in profile: small, multi-generational family contractor with long-standing Somerset County district relationships and likely succession dynamics. NJ NPT-funded routes provide stable revenue; geographically adjacent to Summit's NJ footprint.

name: Brad & Kim Dalrymple Inc
districts_or_customers: Phillipsburg SD and surrounding NJ/PA/NY districts; athletic & field trip work for public and private schools
recent_news: Phillipsburg SD locked in a new school bus contract for 2024-25; second-generation involvement (Kyle Dalrymple as COO) suggests active succession planning underway.
fit_notes: Established 1986 family operator in NJ/PA border market with three-state athletic/charter franchise on top of K-12 home-to-school. Active 2nd-gen management makes timing tricky but fit (NJ-state, K-12 contracts) is strong for Summit.

name: WCBC Professional Bus Svc
recent_news: No web footprint located; listed website georgebus.com does not resolve and is associated with George's Busing in Lehighton, PA (unrelated). No TX SOS, district contractor, or news hits under 'WCBC Professional Bus' in Wise County/Paradise TX.
fit_notes: Likely a very small rural Wise County operator (or stale/mis-coded data-broker record). Insufficient information to evaluate as a Summit target without phone diligence; TX is an expansion state but Paradise is far from current platform.

name: Brittany's Transit Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: Medicaid/Medicare NEMT clients within 50-mile radius of Louisa, VA; 13 counties including Charlottesville/Richmond
recent_news: Operates as a non-emergency medical transportation provider (ambulatory, wheelchair, stretcher) — not a school-bus contractor. No K-12 district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Company is an NEMT/paratransit operator, not a school-bus or SPED home-to-school contractor — outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in scope despite the data-broker 'school=1' flag.

name: Administrative Bus Solutions
recent_news: No corroborating evidence found: no WA OSPI 2024-25 Student Transportation Directory listing, no WA SOS business record, no district contractor mention, and no website (listed firstinvestors.com is an unrelated financial-services site). Likely a stale or mis-attributed data-broker record.
fit_notes: Cannot validate as an operating school-bus contractor. Recommend dropping from priority list unless an authoritative state filing confirms; Yakima/ESD-105 region in WA otherwise serviced by district-run fleets and small private operators.
